rationale: The cited 2007 paper appears highly aligned with the citing paper’s core mechanism: both model 1:1/individual targeting with endogenous strategic responses among competing firms rather than treating marketing actions as exogenous. The citing note explicitly frames its contribution as extending prior targeting work by incorporating competitive behavior, and the cited note is exactly an empirical structural game of targeting strategy and competitive response, making it a plausible theory/mechanism foundation rather than an incidental mention. Although the raw evidence shows only one DOI-matched reference entry, the conceptual overlap is strong enough to retain for full relation judgment.
